title: Ripples of the Past:Time Stop Progress Indicator
description: This mod adds a progress bar timer during time-stop abilities (as seen in Ripples of the Past), visually similar to the one in Roundabout.
body:
This client-side mod adds a depleting progress bar during time-stop abilities in Ripples of the Past, replicating the countdown behavior of Roundabout.

Features:

Client-side visual: Bar decreases from full to empty during time-stop.

Customization via config file:

Set the bar's base color (full state).

Set the text color for the remaining time.

Important Note:

Due to technical limitations in the rendering code, actual colors may slightly deviate from configured values. We apologize for any inconvenience.
